hero.desc: Experience world-class healthcare with modern technology and expert specialists. We're dedicated to your health and well-being around the clock.

home_services.title: Premium Healthcare Services
home_services.desc: We provide a wide range of specialized medical services using the latest technology and expert knowledge.

home_doctors.title: Meet Our Best Doctors
home_doctors.desc: Our specialists are dedicated to providing the highest quality healthcare with a patient-centered approach.

testimonials.title: What Our Patients Say
testimonials.desc: We are committed to providing the best healthcare services to our patients.

t1.text: The medical care I received at Yanet Primary Hospital was exceptional. The doctors were very attentive and the facilities are top-notch.
t1.name: Sarah J.

t2.text: I highly recommend this hospital for their professional staff and modern technology. They really care about their patients.
t2.name: Michael R.

info.title: We Have 6+ Years Of Experience
info.desc: Our hospital is committed to providing the best healthcare services with modern technology and expert specialists.

mission.title: Our Goal is to Provide Best Care
mission.m_desc: To provide high-quality, compassionate healthcare services to our community.
mission.v_desc: To be the leading healthcare provider recognized for excellence and innovation.

camp.title: Free Medical Camp Service
camp.desc: We regularly organize free medical camps to reach out to the community and provide basic healthcare services.

cta.title: Ready to Get Your Health Done?
cta.desc: Contact us today to schedule your appointment and experience world-class healthcare.

about.title_main: We Are Here To Care For
about.desc: Yanet Primary Hospital has been a leader in high-quality medical services for over 6 years. We combine expert medical professionals with cutting-edge technology to ensure your family receives the best possible care, 24/7.

about_page_us.title: We are trusted The Best Certificate Healthcare
about_page_us.desc: Established in 2020, Yanet Primary Hospital has rapidly scaled from a specialized local clinic to a leading primary healthcare provider. Today, we serve over 50,000 patients annually with a dedicated team of 100+ medical professionals and advanced diagnostic labs. Guided by our mission of compassionate care and clinical excellence, we deliver trusted healthcare 24/7.
about_page_us.f1: Scientific skills for getting a better result

about_timeline.title: History & Milestones
about_timeline.desc: Explore our progress and key milestones as we continue to elevate healthcare standards in our community.

2020.title: Founding & Launch
2020.desc: Yanet Primary Hospital opened its doors to deliver high-quality, compassionate healthcare to Hawassa and surrounding regions.

2021.title: Specialty Departments
2021.desc: Inaugurated specialized wings for Pediatrics, Maternity Care, and a 24/7 fully equipped emergency trauma center.

2022.title: Diagnostic Expansion
2022.desc: Launched a state-of-the-art digital laboratory and advanced imaging division, featuring ultrasound and high-resolution X-ray.

2023.title: Regional Medical Camps
2023.desc: Initiated regular free regional medical camps, providing essential healthcare and health education to over 15,000+ underserved citizens.

2024.title: Digital Health Integration
2024.desc: Integrated modern Electronic Medical Records (EMR) systems and remote consultation services for seamless patient experiences.

2025.title: Advanced Wing & Awards
2025.desc: Completed a new surgical wing, expanded capacity to 100+ beds, and achieved the national clinical quality excellence award.

about_leadership.title: Leadership & Management
about_leadership.desc: Our visionary executive leadership team directs hospital operations with a commitment to medical excellence, patient safety, and compassionate care.

ceo.name: Dr. Tebarek Liyana
ceo.bio: A passionate medical entrepreneur dedicated to making advanced healthcare affordable and accessible across Ethiopia.

md.name: Dr. Birhanu Mengiste
md.bio: With over 15 years of surgical experience, he supervises clinical programs, medical protocols, and quality improvement.

cno.name: Sister Tigist Hailu
cno.bio: Directs our nursing divisions with an unwavering focus on patient dignity, clinical compliance, and compassionate nursing care.

coo.name: Ato Samuel Kassa
coo.bio: Coordinates hospital logistics, administrative operations, and public relations to ensure flawless 24/7 service delivery.

about_certifications.title: Licenses & Accreditations
about_certifications.desc: Yanet Primary Hospital is fully accredited and operates under international healthcare protocols, ensuring safe and premium medical operations.

fmhaca.title: FMHACA Licensed
fmhaca.desc: Certified by the Federal Medicine, Health Care Administration and Control Authority of Ethiopia for full surgical and inpatient care.

iso.title: ISO 9001:2015 Quality
iso.desc: Adheres strictly to ISO standards for quality management systems in patient-care delivery and risk controls.

nqs.title: National Quality Award
nqs.desc: Recognized by the Ministry of Health for exceptional hygiene, patient outcomes, and standard of diagnostic services.

ema.title: EMA Code of Conduct
ema.desc: Official member of the Ethiopian Medical Association, committed to the highest ethical and professional medical standards.

about_partnerships.title: Partners & Referrals
about_partnerships.desc: We cooperate with leading insurance companies, national referral hospitals, and international NGOs to provide comprehensive healthcare coverage.

why_choose.desc: At Yanet Primary Hospital, we combine world-class medical expertise with compassionate care. Our facility is equipped with the latest technology to ensure accurate diagnostics and effective treatments for your entire family.

campaign.flu_title: Protect Your Family this Flu Season
campaign.flu_desc: Get your annual flu vaccine today. Fast, safe, and highly effective protection. Walk-ins are fully welcome, or book online to skip any queues.
campaign.wellness_desc: Get a comprehensive body screening package. Includes custom consults with senior specialists. Early screening saves lives.
campaign.maternal_desc: Comprehensive pregnancy program guided by expert OB-GYN specialists. Dedicated support for mother and child before and after birth.

footer.desc: Providing world-class medical services with modern technology and expert healthcare professionals. Your health is our priority.

contact_page.title: Contact Us
contact_page.location_desc: We are conveniently located in the heart of Addis Ababa, easily accessible from all parts of the city.

blog_section.title: Read Our Latest Articles
blog_section.desc: Stay updated with the latest medical news and health tips from our expert doctors.

doctor_team.title: Our Specialist Doctors
doctor_team.desc: Our specialist doctors combine advanced expertise with compassionate care, providing accurate diagnoses and effective treatments.

cta.desc: Our team of specialists is ready to provide you with the best medical care. Schedule your consultation today and take the first step towards better health.

diagnostic.title: Diagnostic
diagnostic.desc: Advanced diagnostic services including X-ray, MRI, and full laboratory testing.

neurology.desc: Specialized care for neurological conditions including stroke and epilepsy.
